programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: (M) The team visits a former Pennsylvania poor farm to confront activity terrifying staff and guests. Can they rectify past horrors to bring peace to this haunted site?

programme.title: Seatbelt Psychic
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Mystery & Paranormal Show
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: These Woods Are Haunted
programme.sub-title: It's Coming for the Cabin and That's Just Not Supposed to Happen
programme.desc: (M) A celebration turns terrifying when Sasquatches surround a remote cabin. A man struggles to overcome his fear after an unknown creature approaches his tent in the dead of night.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.
